sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt32, polygon_1 Polygon, polygon_2 Polygon, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) AS sym_diff FROM geo_test WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 3 DAY;
SELECT id, wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) AS sym_diff FROM geo_test WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '1' DAY ORDER BY sym_diff;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_test WHERE wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, created_at, wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) AS sym_diff FROM geo_test WHERE created_at BETWEEN now() - INTERVAL 3 DAY AND now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT id, wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) AS sym_diff, created_at + INTERVAL 5 DAY AS new_date FROM geo_test HAVING new_date > now();
WITH (SELECT wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) FROM geo_test WHERE id = 1) AS temp_diff SELECT temp_diff, created_at FROM geo_test WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY created_at) AS count_per_date, wkt(arraySort(polygonsSymDifferenceSpherical(polygon_1, polygon_2))) FROM geo_test GROUP BY id, created_at ORDER BY count_per_date DESC;
